task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Telematics' category, 'Samsara' manufacturer, and the 'CM31 Dashcam' and 'VG34 ELD' asset models.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT settings, categories, manufacturers, or models pages showing 'Telematics', 'Samsara', 'CM31 Dashcam', and 'VG34 ELD' have been created.

task_completion.description: Verify the registration of DASH-01, DASH-02, DASH-03 (Model: CM31 Dashcam, Cost: $350.00) and ELD-01, ELD-02, ELD-03 (Model: VG34 ELD, Cost: $150.00) under order PO-TEL-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The All Assets list or individual asset pages showing the 6 new assets with their respective asset tags, correct models, purchase costs ($350.00 or $150.00), and order number 'PO-TEL-001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the asset-to-asset checkouts mapping the devices to their target vehicles: DASH-01/ELD-01 to VEH-101, DASH-02/ELD-02 to VEH-102, and DASH-03/ELD-03 to VEH-103.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset list showing the devices as 'Deployed' with the target vehicle (VEH-101, VEH-102, VEH-103) listed as the checked-out location/asset, or the vehicle asset pages showing the dashcams and ELDs listed under their checked-out assets.

task_completion.description: Verify that the checkout note 'Q3 Telematics Install' was applied during the checkout process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset history, recent activity logs, or checkout confirmation screens displaying the note 'Q3 Telematics Install' associated with the checkouts.

task_completion.description: Verify the status of vehicle VEH-103 has been updated to 'Out for Repair'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The asset list or the specific details page for VEH-103 showing its status label explicitly set to 'Out for Repair'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Cracked windshield' has been added to the notes of vehicle VEH-103.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The details page or edit screen for VEH-103 showing 'Cracked windshield' in the Notes field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Snipe-IT GUI. There should be no evidence of terminal-based API curl commands or automated scripts being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly manipulate the backend database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL, SQLite, or other database command-line interfaces modifying the Snipe-IT database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely entered the data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent actively filling out the asset creation, checkout, and edit forms within the Snipe-IT web interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target taxonomy: Category 'Telematics', Manufacturer 'Samsara', Models 'CM31 Dashcam' and 'VG34 ELD'. Asset mappings: DASH-01, DASH-02, DASH-03 (CM31 Dashcam, $350.00) and ELD-01, ELD-02, ELD-03 (VG34 ELD, $150.00) under PO-TEL-001. Checkout mappings: DASH-01 & ELD-01 to VEH-101, DASH-02 & ELD-02 to VEH-102, DASH-03 & ELD-03 to VEH-103. Checkout note: 'Q3 Telematics Install'. VEH-103 status: 'Out for Repair', notes: 'Cracked windshield'.
